description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 18 hrs 38 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His WakaTime activity spanned 5 projects and was mostly in Java, along with Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories are listed this week.
